nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: Hoary-throated spinetail
nodes.summary: Hoary-throated spinetail（Hoary-throated spinetail，学名 Synallaxis kollari），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 圭亚那
nodes.summary: 圭亚那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括灰䳍、灰腿穴䳍、红脚穴䳍等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rupununi savannah
nodes.summary: Rupununi savannah是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Hoary-throated spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴西
nodes.summary: 巴西是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联854种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、侏䳍、白腹拟䳍等854种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Synallaxis kollari |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22702393A250566196 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22702393A250566196.en |access-date=1 March 2025}} | genus = Synallaxis | species = kollari | authority = Pelzeln, 1856 | synonyms = | range_map = Synallaxis kollari map.svg }} The hoary-throated spinetail (Synallaxis kollari) is an Endangered bird species in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Brazil and Guyana.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Synallaxis kollari |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22702393A250566196 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22702393A250566196.en |access-date=1 March 2025}} | genus = Synallaxis | species = kollari | authority = Pelzeln, 1856 | synonyms = | range_map = Synallaxis kollari map.svg }} The hoary-throated spinetail (Synallaxis kollari) is an Endangered bird species in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Brazil and Guyana.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The hoary-throated spinetail has a very restricted range in the extreme northern Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is primarily threatened by habitat degradation and fires associated with small-scale agricultural operations. "About 60% of the gallery forest within the species' range is inside indigenous reserves" which are not formally protected, and rice is illegally farmed in them by non-indigenous people
